description:
Mirror C.1 for Term::CallClosure: when closure_lit operand resolves
and the inner call folds to a literal, even if the surrounding cont
chain doesn't fold, rewrite the call to \`TailCall(cont, [literal,
...])\` rather than giving up.

Already partially handled (lines 180-208 of ir_reducer.rs); the gap
is the recursive-walk failure case.

## Acceptance

- curried_add: at least one of the apply chains' callsites becomes
  Consumed.
- All 842 tests green; runtime output unchanged.

## Removes

Nothing. Improves reducer coverage.
title: fz-CO.C.2 — Partial fold for Term::CallClosure when cont doesn't fold
